title: polypodium undulatum
intro: Polypodium undulatum, also known as Kunze's polypody or Tasmanian tree fern, is a species of fern native to Australia and New Zealand. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Polypodium undulatum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used topically in creams and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
